intro: Biasolettia cynapioides, also known as false wild carrot or B. cynapioides, is a perennial herb belonging to the Apiaceae family. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects, providing relief from various health issues such as digestive problems, respiratory infections, and skin conditions.
